zh.lifeSummary: 當Bastian Weber於大約1557年出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德時，他的父親Hanß Weber28歲，母親Burga Locher26歲。他於大約1584年與Anna Weylund在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1602年8月28日在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 盧德維格斯包格可維斯海姆享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bastian Weber于大约1557年出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德时，他的父亲Hanß Weber28岁，母亲Burga Locher26岁。他于大约1584年与Anna Weylund在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧哈斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1602年8月28日在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 盧德維格斯包格可維斯海姆享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Weber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a weaver, Middle High German wëber, German Weber, an agent derivative of weben ‘to weave’. This form of the surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, and the Netherlands. In Hungary it is mostly spelled Wéber and Véber. In Russia, Slovenia, Czechia, Slovakia, and Croatia it is (also) established in the Slavicized form Veber , which is in Czechia also spelled Vebr. Compare Waber , Weaber , Weaver , Webber , and Webre .

History: As a name of ultimately Swiss German origin the surname Weber is also established among the American Mennonites. However, descendants of the early Mennonite settlers, who came to PA in the early 18th century, mostly bear the Americanized form of the name (see Weaver ).

variants.name: Wieber
meanings: German:
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wīg ‘battle, war’ + berht ‘bright’, ‘famous’.
southwestern form of   Weber  .

variants.name: Webert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto.
German: variant of   Weber  .

variants.name: Waber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Isadore.  German Hans, Kurt.
German: from a Silesian dialect form for   Weber   ‘weaver’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Weaver
meanings: English: occupational name, from an agent derivative of Middle English weven ‘to weave’ (Old English wefan).

English: habitational name from a place on the Weaver river in Cheshire, now called Weaver Hall but recorded simply as Weuere in the 13th and 14th centuries. The river name is from Old English wēfer(e) ‘winding stream’.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘weaver’, for example German Weber , Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Tkacz or Tkach , Hungarian Takács (see Takacs ), and Slovenian Tkalec, Tekavec or Veber .

variants.name: Veber
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic), Slovenian, Croatian, Serbian, and Czech; Hungarian (Véber); Slovak (also Véber): occupational name for a weaver, of German origin (see Weber ), often applied as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic occupational names or surnames.

variants.name: Weeber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Dieter.
German: variant of   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Wever
meanings: North German and Dutch: occupational name for a weaver, Middle Low German wever, Middle Dutch wever(e). Compare Weber .
English: variant of   Weaver  .

variants.name: Textor
meanings: German and Dutch: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of Weber or Wever , from Latin textor ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Weaber
meanings: Americanized form of German   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Cecile, Marcel.
French: altered form of German   Weber   ‘weaver’. This surname is rare in France. In the US, it is found mainly in LA.
History: This surname was brought to LA by Jean Baptiste Webre born 1725 or 1727 in Alsace, France, died 1787 in LA. His ancestors were from Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Bastian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Sébastien .

en.lifeSummary: When Bastian Weber was born about 1557, in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, his father, Hanß Weber, was 28 and his mother, Burga Locher, was 26. He married Anna Weylund about 1584, in Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 August 1602, in Kornwestheim, Ludwigsburg, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bastian Weber est né environ 1557, à Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, son père, Hanß Weber, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Burga Locher, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anna Weylund environ 1584, à Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 août 1602, à Kornwestheim, Landkreis Ludwigsburg, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 46 ans.

Lui sposato Anna Weylund circa 1584, nel Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. ko.Evangelische Kirche, Nürtingen, Württemb: 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 크레이스 위p르프u르스 위p르펠드 커체
ko.lifeSummary: Bastian Weber(이)가 대략 1557년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 하그스펠드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hanß Weber(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Burga Locher(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1584년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 하그스펠드에서 Anna Weylund(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1602년 8월 28일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 루드위그스버그 코른베스테임에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bastian Weber nasceu aproximadamente 1557, em Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, seu pai, Hanß Weber, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Burga Locher, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Weylund aproximadamente 1584, em Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1602, em Kornwestheim, Landkreis Ludwigsburg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bastian Weber родился около 1557 г. в местности хагсфелд, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, его отцу по имени Hanß Weber было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Burga Locher, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Weylund около 1584 г. в местности хагсфелд, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 августа 1602 г. в местности корнвестим, ландкрис лудвигсбург, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 46 лет.

Se casó con Anna Weylund aproximadamente 1584, en Hagsfeld, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1602, en Kornwestheim, Landkreis Ludwigsburg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 46 años.
